steps.title: Cover the work and artist
steps.content: The goal is to describe Unwoven Light for an audience unfamiliar with Mina Sun Lee. A strong answer should identify Lee and give the defining visual effect: light passing through an iridescent-tiled fence to form colorful prisms.

steps.title: Reject incomplete descriptions
steps.content: Choice A describes materials but does not identify Lee for the audience. Choice B identifies the artist and year but barely describes the work. Choice C gives one material detail but omits the prism effect and artist background. The answer is D.
